notes: Initial formula set inspired by Galaxy Legion equation references, adapted for SpaceShift. Economy bridge formulas: substitution_relief = clamp(substitution_coverage * avg_substitution_fidelity * scarcity_substitution_elasticity, 0, 0.55); volatility_damped = clamp(volatility_undamped * (1 - damping_strength), 0.02, 0.30). Runtime coefficients and toggles live in element_resource_tiers.market_crafting_tuning.
